keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY EYES. Eyes : Aco., Agar., Ap., Arg-n., Ars., Bell. , Calc-c. , Caust., Euphr., Gels., Grap., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Rut., Sep., Sul., Ver-a., Zin. Eyes, right : Am-c., Bell., Calc-c., Cann., Coloc., Euphr., Lyc., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Petr., Pho., Plat., Rhus-t., Seneg., Sil. Eyes, left : Ap., Ars., Asar., Bry., Chel., Chin., Hep., Laur., Mez., Nux-v., Plb., Spig., Spo., Squil., Stan., Sul., Tarx., Thu. Eyes, alternating between : Aco., Agar., Ang., Ars., Bell., Chin., Cup., Lyc., Pul., Ran-b., Seneg., Sil. Eyes, backward (drawing, etc.) : Bry., Crot-t., Grap., Grind., Hep., Lach., Par., Pho., Pru-s, Rhus-t., Sil., Spig. Eyes, eyeball : Aco., Bell., Calc-c., Cimi., Euphr., Hep., Lyc., Phyt., Pru-s, Spig., Sul. Eyes, eyeball, behind : Bad., Bry., Chel., Cimi., Gels., Lac-f., Lach., Lith-c., Merc., Pod., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Ther. Eyes, eyeball, falling out, as if : Brom., Hell., Lyc., Sep., Tril. Eyes, eyeball, motions of : Agar., Bell., Cham., Cup., Hyo., Stram. Eyes, eyeball, oscillation : Agar., Cocc., Cup., Gels., Zin. Eyes, eyeball, sore, aching, bruised, as if : Arn., Bapt., Bry., Cimi., Eup-p., Gels., Merc., Onos., Pho., Phyt., Rhus-t., Sang. Eyes, conjunctiva : Aco., Ap., Arg-n., Ars., Bell., Cepa., Euphr., Merc., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul. Eyes, conjunctiva, granular : Ap., Arg-n., Ars., Kali-bi. Eyes, conjunctiva, inflamed : Aco., Arg-n., Ars., Bell., Euphr., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul. Eyes, conjunctiva, phlyctænæ : Ars., Grap. Eyes, conjunctiva, saccular : Ap., Ars. Eyes, sclerotic : Aco., Rut., Sul. Eyes, cornea : Calc-c., Cann., Con., Euphr., Hep., Merc., Pul., Sul. Eyes, cornea, opacity : Arg-n., Calc-c., Cann., Lach., Pul., Sil., Sul., Zin-s. Eyes, iris : Bell., Merc-c., Merc., Nit-ac., Sul. Eyes, lens : Euphr., Pul., Sil., Sul. Eyes, lens, cataract : Calc-c., Calc-p., Caust., Euphr., Pho., Sec-c., Sil., Sul. Eyes, pupils , adherent : Nit-ac. Eyes, pupils, contracted : Aco., Chel., Cocc., Sep., Sil., Sul., Ver-a. Eyes, pupils, dilated : Bell., Calc-c., Hep., Hyo., Op., Spig., Stram. Eyes, pupils, fixed : Bell., Cup., Op. Eyes, pupils, irregular : Merc., Sul. Eyes, brows : Bell., Caust., Kali-c., Par., Sele. Eyes, brows, outward along : Cinnb., Kali-bi., Mez. Eyes, orbits : Ap., Merc-i-f., Rhus-t., Spig., Syph., Val. Eyes, canthi : Agar., Calc-c., Carb-v., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Sil., Sul. Eyes, canthi, inner : Agar., Bell., Stap., Zin. Eyes, canthi, outer : Calc-c., Ran-b., Sul. Eyes, canthi, gum in : Agar., Ant-c., Calc-c., Grap., Lyc., Stap. Eyes, canthi, inflamed : Ant-c., Arg-n., Euphr., Grap. Eyes, canthi, red : Ap., Rhus-t. Eyes, canthi, red, pale : Ap. Eyes, canthi, red, dark : Rhus-t. Eyes, lids : Aco., Agar., Ap., Bell., Calc-c., Caust., Hep., Merc., Rhus-t., Sep., Spig., Sul. Eyes, lids, upper : Caust., Gels., Kalm., Sep., Spig. Eyes, lids, lower : Calc-c., Pho-ac., Rut., Seneg. Eyes, lids, edges, tarsi : Bor., Merc., Pul., Stap., Sul., Val. Eyes, lids, edges, inflamed : Grap., Pul., Sul. Eyes, lids, edges, red : Ars., Euphr., Grap., Merc., Pul., Sul. Eyes, lids, edges, scaly : Ars., Grap., Merc., Sep. Eyes, lids, edges, thick, swelled : Calc-c., Euphr., Grap., Hep., Merc., Pul. Eyes, lids, inner surfaces : Arg-n., Ars., Rhus-t. Eyes, lids, agglutinated, suppuration : Caust., Euphr., Lyc., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Eyes, lids, closed, drawn, shut : Coloc. Eyes, lids, closed tightly, spasm : Ars., Bell., Cham., Hyo., Kali-c., Merc., Stram. Eyes, lids, closed tightly, agg. by : Bry., Lach., Sep., Ther. Eyes, lids, dry : Rhus-t., Ver-a. Eyes, lids, heavy, falling, drooping, paralysis, etc. : Caust., Cham., Cocc., Con., Gels., Kali-p., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Sep., Spig., Ver-a. Eyes, lids, inflamed : Aco., Ars., Bell., Lyc., Pul., Stap., Sul. Eyes, lids, inflamed, gonorrhal : Aco., Pul., Sul., Thu. Eyes, lids, nodes : Grap., Stap. Eyes, lids, open, half open, etc. : Bapt., Bell., Cup., Hell., Lyc., Op., Pod., Samb., Stram. Eyes, lids, open, one : Ant-t., Chin., Ign., Ver-a. Eyes, lids, red : Aco., Lyc. Eyes, lids, styes : Grap., Pul., Stap., Sul. Eyes, lids, swelled, upper : Kali-c., Sep. Eyes, lids, swelled, lower : Ap., Ars., Pho. Eyes, burning : Ars., Bell., Brom., Bry., Grap., Merc-c., Pho., Sul., Zin. Eyes, coldness : Calc-c., Croc., Flu-ac. Eyes, crossed , as if : Bell., Calc-c., Con., Op., Pod., Pul., Zin. Eyes, drawn together, as if : Lach., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Zin. Eyes, dry : Aco., Alu., Bell., Lyc., Nux-m., Pul., Sul. Eyes, dull : Op. Eyes, forward , pressure : Bry., Kali-m., Merc-c., Nux-v., Pru-s, Sang., Spig. Eyes, glaucoma : Pho. Eyes, injected : Aco., Ap., Arg-n., Arn., Bell., Cepa., Glo., Led., Merc., Nat-m., Nux-v. Eyes, itching : Calc-c., Pul., Sul. Eyes, lachrymation : Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Cepa., Euphr., Kre., Merc., Nat-m., Pul., Rhus-t., Rut., Saba., Sil., Stap., Stram., Sul. Eyes, light , agg. : Bell., Calc-c., Nat-s., Rhus-t. Eyes, lippitude : Aco., Euphr., Merc., Pul., Rhus-t., Stram. Eyes, protruding : Aco., Bell., Chlor., Guai., Hyo., Iod. Eyes, radiating pain : Mez., Spig. Eyes, raw : Arg-n., Kali-io., Lyc. Eyes, red : Asar., Bell., Merc., Rhus-t., Spig. Eyes, rubbing , amel. : Cina., Croc., Pul. Eyes, sparkling : Bell., Stram. Eyes, squint : Alu., Bell., Calc-c., Cic., Con., Cup., Cycl., Hyo., Nat-m. Eyes, staring : Bell., Cic., Hell., Hyo., Ign., Op., Stram. Eyes, sunken : Abro., Ant-c., Ant-t., Ars., Cam., Chin., Cina., Fer., Pho-ac., Sec-c., Stap., Sul., Ver-a. Eyes, swelled , as if : Com., Guai., Mez., Nat-m., Par., Pru-s, Rhus-t., Seneg., Spig., Spo. Eyes, touch , agg. : Aur. Eyes, twisting or revolving, as if : Pho., Phys., Pop-c. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
